title: Birth
description: Shivaji Maharaj was born at the Shivneri Fort.

title: Capture of Torna Fort
description: At a young age, Shivaji captured the Torna Fort, marking the beginning of his quest to establish Swarajya.

title: Conflict with Afzal Khan
description: Shivaji defeated the Bijapur general Afzal Khan in a strategic encounter.

title: Treaty of Purandar
description: Shivaji signed a peace treaty with Raja Jai Singh I of the Mughal Empire.

title: Coronation
description: Shivaji was formally crowned as the Chhatrapati, establishing the Maratha Empire.

title: Passing
description: Shivaji Maharaj passed away at Raigad Fort.
